# Withdrawal Requirements Checklist: Withdraw from a Class

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for withdrawal confirmation,
implications, and failure consistency  
**Created**: 2026-03-14  
**Feature**: [/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/014-withdraw-class/spec.md](/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/014-withdraw-class/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based
on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are prerequisites for withdraw eligibility in schedule view explicitly documented? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are implication contents (transcript and fees) fully specified before confirmation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK003 Are cancel and failure outcomes both defined with unchanged-state guarantees? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK004 Are concurrent-state and idempotency behaviors fully captured in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-009]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is "clear failure feedback" defined with measurable or testable messaging intent? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK006 Is the boundary between UC-14 and UC-15 policy enforcement unambiguous? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "explicit confirmation" defined sufficiently to avoid accidental commit ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do User Story 1 and FR-005 consistently define withdrawal completion evidence? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK009 Do User Story 2 and FR-006 align on cancel flow state outcomes? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK010 Do edge cases align with failure and idempotency requirements without contradiction? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-009]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Are success criteria measurable for success, cancel, and failure paths? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK012 Can completion-time expectation be objectively validated from written criteria? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario and Edge-Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK013 Are all documented UC-14 flows (main, 4a, 5a) represented in requirement-level text? [Coverage, Spec §User Stories]
- [ ] CHK014 Are duplicate-submit and concurrent-change scenarios explicitly addressed? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK015 Are dependency failure scenarios for implications retrieval represented? [Coverage, Gap]

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [ ] CHK016 Are assumption boundaries between schedule data source and withdrawal write path explicit? [Dependency, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK017 Are traceability constraints to UC-14/UC-14-AS used as quality gates? [Traceability, Spec §FR-011]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: Confirmation safety, consistency under failures, and
  requirement traceability.
- Depth level: Standard (recommended default applied).
- Actor/timing: Reviewer during planning and pull-request review.
